For {Account} usage, a {_setSigner} function is provided to set the {signer} address. Doing so is easier for a factory, who is likely to use initializable clones of this contract. Example of usage: ```solidity contract MyAccountECDSA is Account, SignerECDSA, Initializable {     function initialize(address signerAddr) public initializer {       _setSigner(signerAddr);     } } ``` IMPORTANT: Failing to call {_setSigner} either during construction (if used standalone) or during initialization (if used as a clone) may leave the signer either front-runnable or
